final:
module shift_register(
    input               clk         ,   
    input               rst         ,
    input               enable      ,
 
    output  reg [7:0]   data_out
);
    
   //shift register
     wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
       if(rst) begin
          data_out <= 8'b0;
       end
       else if(enable) begin
          data_out <= data_out << 1;
       end
   end
     
endmodule
